provenance: Invented for v0 balance, needs Eli's blessing. Role fixed by ARCHITECTURE sections 10-11: burnsTo target of every flammable; Tavern Fire golden asserts the ash count.
notes: Terminal burn product - itself non-flammable so burn chains halt (no burnsTo cycles). Near-insulator, minimal thermal mass (16, above the enforced minimum 12). Low opacity (4): a burned-out roof lets daylight pour in, which is what wakes the Light system after burnout.
